analyze_database_info: Exec "ANALYZE" command on database for optimal performance.
are_you_sure_to_delete_note: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
are_you_sure_to_delete_reference: Are you sure you want to delete this reference?
are_you_sure_to_delete_this_record: Are you sure to delete this record?
backfill_search_stores_info: Rebuilds the derived search stores (matrix_string_search, matrix_relation_index) from the record data. Use after "Recreate database assets". Takes minutes on large databases.
choose_page_between: Choose page between ${page_in} and ${page_out}. Total pages: ${total_pages}.
component_alternative: Alternative field. Do not use unless the term is not normalized. Use instead: %s
component_deprecated: Field in the process of disappearing. This field merges with: %s
consolidate_table_sequences_info:
Renumbers table id column to consolidate id sequence from 1,2,...
[dd_ontology, matrix_ontology, matrix_ontology_main, matrix_dd]
data_was_not_modified_save_canceled: The data was not modified. Save canceled.
db_writable_check_invalid: Database: db is not writable! Check user permissions
delete_found_records: All records found will be deleted.
email_limit_explanation: The emails selected to send exceed the maximum limit of your operating system, so we have proceeded to create packages that do not exceed this maximum. Click on the following buttons to create the emails.
enter_username_or_email: Please enter your username or email
entity_invalid: Entity name must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers and underscores (no spaces). Try:
exceeded_limit: The maximum number of values for this field has been exceeded. Limit =
failed_install_context: Server has failed to get context for db status
generated_secrets_warning: ⚠ Save these secrets now — they are shown only once and must never be changed later:
graph_hint: Click a node to expand or collapse its relations. Ctrl/Cmd + click opens the record.
head: Header
import_hierarchies_description: It will be displayed in the thesaurus. Keep in mind that large countries can consume a lot of resources. Don't load unnecessary countries. You can always load more countries later
installation_db_error_file_path: Database file not found! Please verify that the installation file exists in:
installation_db_prereq: Prerequisite: an accessible PostgreSQL database whose role can create tables, indexes and functions. Enter the connection details and test them.
installation_diffusion_help: Optional: the diffusion (publication) engine uses a MariaDB/MySQL database. Enable it only if you will publish content. You can configure it later.
installation_directories_help: Dédalo needs write permission on its working directories (private, sessions, cache, media, backup). Check them and create any that are missing.
installation_entity_help: Identify this installation. The information and info key are set once and must not be changed afterwards (they are part of how stored credentials are encrypted).
installation_mailer_help: Optional: outbound email lets users recover a forgotten password from the login screen (an 8-digit code is emailed to them). Dédalo relays through an existing SMTP mailbox — it never runs its own mail server. You can configure it later in ../private/.env.
installation_persist_help: Save the configuration to ../private/.env (outside the web root, chmod 600). Strong secrets will be generated and shown once — store them safely.
language_default_invalid: The default interface and data languages must be among the selected languages
languages_required: Select at least one working language
maintenance_map_hint: Click a subsystem to see its status and the tools that act on it.
name: Name
no_tag_selected: No tag selected. If you continue, the entire record will be indexed.
not_allow_to_create_note: Cannot create notes of a change that is not yours
open_relationships_of_field: Open relationships of {0} from the current record (1) or from all found records ({1})?
optimize_tables_info: Re-index and vacuum analyze the selected tables.
password_too_short: Password too short. Use at least 8 characters
password_updated: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.
rebuild_user_stats_info: Re-create the user activity stats, calculated from table matrix_activity and saved in section dd1521 as daily summaries.
records_displayed: Displayed records from X to Y of Z
recover_password_help: Enter your username or email address and we will send you an 8-digit recovery code.
recovery_code_help: We sent an 8-digit code to your email. Enter it below with your new password.
recovery_code_sent: If an account matches, a recovery code has been sent.
recovery_reset_failed: Could not update the password. Please try again later.
recovery_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
recreate_db_assets_info: Forces recreate all PostgreSQL main indexes, constraints, extensions and functions.
register_tools_help: Register the available tools (import, export, time machine, …) so they appear in the application. This scans the tools directory and records each tool in the database. You can always re-run this later from Maintenance → Register tools.
request_code_first: Please request a recovery code first
reset_pick_installed: Tick one or more already-installed hierarchies to reset.
reset_warning: This DELETES and re-imports from the seed, discarding any local edits
select_one_project: You must select at least one project
select_page_of_the_doc: Select a page of the document:
site_in_recovery_mode: WARNING: The system is in recovery mode, your main ontology is probably damaged!
site_under_maintenance: System under maintenance. Sorry for the inconvenience
smtp_from_help: The sender address of outbound mail. When empty, the username is used.
smtp_secure_help: tls = STARTTLS (port 587) · ssl = implicit TLS (port 465) · none = unencrypted (localhost relays only)
sure_delete_entry_all_langs: This entry will be deleted from all languages.
test_diffusion_first: Test the diffusion connection successfully before continuing (or disable it).
test_mailer_first: Test the SMTP connection successfully before continuing (or disable outbound email).
title: Title
type_root_password: Type and retype your desired superuser password and keep it in a safe place. Use a strong password from 8 to 32 characters containing, at least, an upper-case letter, a lower-case letter, and a number. Identical characters in sequential order are not allowed ('aa', '11', 'BB', etc.). Numerical ('123', '345', etc.) nor alphabetical ('aBC', 'hIjK', etc.) order are allowed.
will_open_all_related_records: This will open all related data of {0} of all records in a new window without filtering. Are you sure?
